stemHtml: What is the definition of situational awareness?

options.a: The ability to rank tasks according to importance and to solve problems.
options.b: The perception of the elements in the environment within a volume of space.
options.c: The perception of the elements in the environment within a volume of space and time, the comprehension of their meaning and the projection of their status in the near future.
options.d: The right to have and express your own feelings and ideas.
